title: Monday sales CRM vs monday work management
excerpt:

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
The monday.com universe of products is always expanding and we’ve received a lot of questions in our community about out when to use which product, especially when it comes to monday sales CRM.

For our first community hour of 2024, we invited Ron Kimhi, head of sales CRM to delve into the differences between monday work management and monday sales CRM.

This season is open to all individuals, from those who are using sales CRM and for those that just want to learn more!

Community hour - Work management vs. sales CRM (5)1620×1620 363 KB

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: Great info, thank you for holding this session @Julietteb and @Ronk!
